# Mission 36 - Finance Preview UX Layer

## Mission Goal
Display-only financial preview for JobCard in Soft Run Internal ERP.

## Phase
M31–M37 Product UX + Soft Run Interface Layer

## Dependencies
- Mission 31 — Design System
- Mission 32 — Application Shell
- Mission 33 — JobCard UX
- Mission 28 — Payment foundation

## Created Files
- public_html/erp-finance-preview-workbench.php
- public_html/erp-jobcard-finance-preview-ux.php
- public_html/erp-payment-preview-detail-ux.php
- public_html/erp-invoice-preview-mock.php
- public_html/assets/moghare360-ui/moghare360-finance-preview-ux.css
- public_html/includes/moghare360-finance-preview-ux-data.php
- docs/missions/mission_36_finance_preview_ux_layer/ (11 Markdown files)

## Mission Boundary
Preview only. SELECT read-only. No payment write. No invoice/accounting/tax.

## Next Mission
Mission 37 (indicative) — not started until M36 signoff
